'''Cladus Glynn''' was an officer in the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]], and was stationed on [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
His role was to locate any [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] personnel moving through the [[Kothlis system/Legends|Kothlis system]], specifically at the [[Kothlis shadowport]]. To help him gather information, Glynn assumed the guise of '''Gart''', the drunken spacer who claimed to know the location of a [[ganjuko]] graveyard.

==Appearances==
